projectDescription: AI-driven agile development framework with specialized agents, guided workflows, and scale-adaptive intelligence for building software from ideation to implementation.
keyFeatures: 12+ specialized AI agents (Product Manager, Architect, Developer, QA, Scrum Master, UX Designer, etc.)
34+ structured workflows across 4 development phases (Analysis, Planning, Solutioning, Implementation)
Scale-adaptive planning intelligence that adjusts from bug fixes to enterprise systems
Module ecosystem with official extensions (BMad Builder, Test Architect, Game Dev Studio, Creative Intelligence Suite)
Party Mode for multi-agent collaboration and discussion
CLI installer with interactive and non-interactive modes
Skills architecture for custom agent and workflow extensions
BMad Help system for intelligent context-aware guidance
Complete development lifecycle coverage from brainstorming to deployment
Cross-platform AI IDE integration (Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, etc.)
publicApiSurface: bmad install - Install BMad Method in a project
bmad uninstall - Remove BMad Method components
Product Manager Agent (John) - PRD creation, requirements discovery
Architect Agent - Solution architecture and technical design
Developer Agent - Implementation guidance and code review
QA Engineer Agent - Test strategy and quality assurance
Scrum Master Agent - Sprint planning and agile ceremonies
UX Designer Agent - User experience and interface design
Analyst Agent - Business analysis and requirements
Phase 1 Workflows - Analysis (brainstorming, user research, competitive analysis)
Phase 2 Workflows - Planning (PRD creation, UX design, architecture)
Phase 4 Workflows - Implementation (sprint planning, reviews, retrospectives)
Quick Flow - Rapid development for small features and fixes
Document Project - Generate comprehensive project documentation
